Thank you for your interest in contributing to this library!

## Using the issue tracker

The issue tracker on GitHub is the preferred channel for PDFCraft bug reports, feature requests, and discussions.

Bug reports should include a minimal reproduction that runs in one of the repository playgrounds or a similar service.

## Pull requests

**Please do not commit changes in `package.json` file if is not related to the pull request changes.**

Run Prettier before submitting changes. Do not make unrelated code style changes.
